lyricsEditor.textStart: Then the Queen left off, quite out of breath, and said to Alice, "Have you seen the Mock Turtle yet?" "No," said Alice,
lyricsEditor.textEnd: ," said the Mock Turtle. "Hold your tongue!" added the Gryphon, before Alice could speak again. The Mock Turtle went on.

stylesField.ariaLabel: deep synths, soft male vocals, dark ambient, strong male vocal, mexican rap
stylesField.note: Styles 仍是原生 textarea；Lyrics 已改为 Lexical div

automationImplications: 旧版 textarea.value / setRangeText 对 Lyrics 不再适用

真实文本在 55 个

+ [data-lexical-text] 节点中，不是单一 value
字符计数在编辑器外壳上：3829 of 5000 / 3829/5000
Cowriter prompt 是独立 textbox，必须排除
Styles 仍是 textarea，与 Lyrics 控件类型不同
人工粘贴可一次写入 3000+ 字；自动化需模拟 Lexical 输入链而非 DOM 硬写
